# Nua.CSS

> Nua.CSS is a lightweight, mobile-first CSS reset framework designed to provide consistent styling across modern web browsers while preserving useful browser defaults and optimising performance.

Important notes:

- Nua.CSS is a CSS reset rather than a UI framework.
- Designed for modern browsers with a mobile-first approach.
- Preserves useful browser defaults instead of aggressively removing them.
- Distributed under the MIT License.
- Maintained as an Open-Source project by OSTARA.WORK.

## Website

- [Nua.CSS Homepage](https://www.ostara.work/nua): Official project page hosted by OSTARA.WORK.
- [Nua.CSS Demo](https://nua-css.pages.dev/): Interactive demonstration of the framework.
- [Nua.CSS Story](https://nua-css.pages.dev/mobile-first-css-reset-stylesheet): Detailed explanation of the project's goals, philosophy, and design decisions.

## Download

- [Minified CSS Build](https://nua-css.pages.dev/assets/css/nua.min.css): Production-ready version of Nua.CSS.
- [NPM Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/nua-css): Install Nua.CSS using npm.

## Source Code

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/OSTARA711/nua-css): Source code, issue tracking, and releases.

## Documentation

- [Project Documentation](https://nua-css.pages.dev/mobile-first-css-reset-stylesheet): Overview of features, browser support, and implementation details.

## Features

- Mobile-first CSS reset.
- Cross-browser consistency.
- Simplified box model.
- Responsive image support.
- Accessibility-focused defaults.
- Lightweight and performance-oriented design.
- Easy integration into existing projects.

## Author

- [Saskia Ostermann Toutatis](https://www.ostara.work): Creator and maintainer of Nua.CSS.
- [OSTARA.WORK](https://www.ostara.work): Federation of Digital Commons and Open-Source initiatives.
